summary.en: A guest intelligence platform for high-value corporate events.
summary.zh: 為高價值企業活動打造的賓客情報平台。

highlight.en: Moots engineers the room at brand activations, advisory retreats, and investor gatherings so each guest leaves with the conversation they came for and a lasting relationship.
highlight.zh: Moots 為品牌活動、顧問靜修與投資人聚會設計現場互動,讓每位賓客都能進行他們想要的對話,並建立持久的關係。

summary.en: AI agents that build B2B datasets for GTM teams.
summary.zh: 為市場進入團隊建立 B2B 資料集的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: PromptLoop automates account research by crawling company websites, social profiles, and public sources to enrich thousands of accounts with company data and buying-intent markers in minutes.
highlight.zh: PromptLoop 透過爬取公司網站、社群檔案與公開來源來自動化客戶研究,可在數分鐘內為數千個客戶補充公司資料與購買意向標記。

summary.en: Dynamic access controls for all data and databases.
summary.zh: 適用於所有資料與資料庫的動態存取控制。

highlight.en: JumpWire automatically identifies sensitive fields in large datasets and lets developers define policies controlling who can read or update records, such as restricting customer PII or splitting data by region for GDPR.
highlight.zh: JumpWire 自動辨識大型資料集中的敏感欄位,讓開發者透過政策控制誰能讀取或更新記錄,例如限制客戶個資存取或為 GDPR 依地區分割資料。

summary.en: Targeting the tumor ecosystem to overcome cancer drug resistance.
summary.zh: 鎖定腫瘤生態系統以克服癌症抗藥性。

highlight.en: Alixia's compounds disrupt metabolic and inflammatory triggers in both cancer and quasi-cancerous cells of the tumor microenvironment, aiming for more effective, longer-lasting treatments.
highlight.zh: Alixia 的化合物阻斷腫瘤微環境中癌細胞與類癌細胞的代謝與發炎觸發機制,目標是達成更有效、更持久的治療。

summary.en: Digital banking in India for non-resident Indian expats (NRIs).
summary.zh: 為非居民印度僑民(NRI)打造的印度數位銀行服務。

highlight.en: Emigre offers an end-to-end digital Indian banking solution so expats can support family back home, shop on Indian websites, and invest in Indian stocks and real estate.
highlight.zh: Emigre 提供端到端的印度數位銀行方案,讓僑民能匯款支持家鄉親人、在印度網站購物,並投資印度股票與房地產。

summary.en: A digital program for managing tinnitus.
summary.zh: 用於管理耳鳴的數位療程。

highlight.en: Tinnitus affects 1 in 8 people, and Oto delivers effective therapy through digital programs at a fraction of the cost of in-person specialist treatment.
highlight.zh: 耳鳴影響每八人中就有一人,Oto 透過數位療程提供有效治療,費用僅為親自看專科醫師的一小部分。

summary.en: Rippling for trucking: all-in-one workforce management for fleets.
summary.zh: 貨運業的 Rippling:為車隊打造的一站式人力管理。

highlight.en: Drivingforce consolidates back-office functions like compliance, payroll, and recruiting so trucking fleets can manage their entire workforce in one place.
highlight.zh: Drivingforce 整合合規、薪資與招募等後勤功能,讓貨運車隊能在單一平台管理整個勞動力。

summary.en: An AI chat app from the team behind UploadThing and Ping.gg.
summary.zh: 由 UploadThing 與 Ping.gg 團隊打造的 AI 聊天應用。

highlight.en: T3 Chat is one of several products from this team, alongside UploadThing for file uploads, PicThing for background removal, and Ping.gg for live streamer collaboration.
highlight.zh: T3 Chat 是此團隊眾多產品之一,其他還包括檔案上傳工具 UploadThing、去背工具 PicThing,以及直播主即時協作工具 Ping.gg。

summary.en: Amazon-level personalization for Shopify merchants.
summary.zh: 為 Shopify 商家提供 Amazon 等級的個人化推薦。

highlight.en: Suggestr's no-code, multi-modal AI understands products visually so it needs 100x less data, letting brands of any size add recommendations and bundles in under 30 minutes.
highlight.zh: Suggestr 的免程式多模態 AI 能以視覺方式理解商品,所需資料量減少 100 倍,讓任何規模的品牌都能在 30 分鐘內加入推薦與組合銷售。

summary.en: An intelligent customer implementation platform for B2B companies.
summary.zh: 為 B2B 公司打造的智慧客戶導入平台。

highlight.en: Sero uses AI agents to help onboarding, implementation, and professional services teams bring B2B customers live faster, more consistently, and more efficiently.
highlight.zh: Sero 運用 AI 代理協助導入、實作與專業服務團隊,讓 B2B 客戶上線更快速、更一致且更有效率。

summary.en: A browser extension that guides sales teams through live SaaS demos.
summary.zh: 在 SaaS 即時展示中引導銷售團隊的瀏覽器擴充功能。

highlight.en: Demo Gorilla surfaces relevant talking points based on the product screen and audience, tracks notes back to the CRM, and shares slides inline to keep deals on track.
highlight.zh: Demo Gorilla 依據當前產品畫面與聽眾呈現相關話術,將筆記回寫至 CRM,並在展示中內嵌分享投影片,讓交易保持進度。

summary.en: An easier way to deploy and manage cloud applications.
summary.zh: 更簡單的雲端應用部署與管理方式。

highlight.en: Nullstone gives developers self-service deployment while launching compliance-certified, security-vetted infrastructure by default, with features like preview environments and automatic secrets management.
highlight.zh: Nullstone 讓開發者自助部署,同時預設啟用通過合規認證與安全審查的基礎設施,並提供預覽環境與自動密鑰管理等功能。

summary.en: Software to create 3D video for VR, robotics, and film.
summary.zh: 為 VR、機器人與影視製作 3D 影片的軟體。

highlight.en: Lifecast's tools produce state-of-the-art 3D VR video that fixes motion sickness; the team's experience spans VR cameras at Facebook and robot perception at Lyft and Google X.
highlight.zh: Lifecast 的工具能製作頂尖的 3D VR 影片並改善動暈症,團隊經驗橫跨 Facebook 的 VR 攝影機與 Lyft、Google X 的機器人感知系統。

summary.en: Payments and analytics for apps in the OpenAI GPT Store.
summary.zh: 為 OpenAI GPT Store 應用提供支付與分析。

highlight.en: Top Road provides no-code analytics and payment tools so creators can monetize their custom GPTs within the OpenAI ecosystem.
highlight.zh: Top Road 提供免程式的分析與支付工具,讓創作者能在 OpenAI 生態系中將自訂 GPT 變現。

summary.en: Direct-to-consumer skincare for eczema and chronic skin conditions.
summary.zh: 針對濕疹與慢性皮膚狀況的直營(D2C)護膚產品。

highlight.en: Soteri's patented pH/LOCK technology holds skin at a therapeutic pH for 12+ hours, a non-prescription approach shown to relieve eczema, psoriasis, and sunburn for the 30 million American sufferers.
highlight.zh: Soteri 的專利 pH/LOCK 技術能將皮膚維持在治療性酸鹼值達 12 小時以上,這種免處方方式經證實可緩解濕疹、乾癬與曬傷,造福 3000 萬名美國患者。

summary.en: Turn everyday videos into movies.
summary.zh: 將日常影片變成電影。

highlight.en: Codec aims to be a production team that fits in your pocket, transforming the everyday videos anyone shoots on a phone into polished movies.
highlight.zh: Codec 致力成為放進口袋的製作團隊,把任何人用手機拍的日常影片轉化為精緻電影。

summary.en: Reimagined cord blood, cord tissue, and placenta stem cell banking.
summary.zh: 重新打造的臍帶血、臍帶組織與胎盤幹細胞儲存服務。

highlight.en: Anja Health helps pregnant parents save stem cells from the umbilical cord and placenta to unlock future disease treatments.
highlight.zh: Anja Health 協助孕期父母保存來自臍帶與胎盤的幹細胞,為未來疾病治療預作準備。

summary.en: Subscription news for the entertainment industry.
summary.zh: 為娛樂產業打造的訂閱制新聞。

highlight.en: The Ankler delivers entertainment-industry news so essential that everyone from CEOs to creators pays to read it every day.
highlight.zh: The Ankler 提供如此不可或缺的娛樂產業新聞,從執行長到創作者都付費每日閱讀。

summary.en: An operating system for Hollywood, starting with production scheduling.
summary.zh: 好萊塢的作業系統,從製作排程工具切入。

highlight.en: Cinapse reimagines the production schedule, the foundation of every film and TV project, helping filmmakers map the path from idea to image better, faster, and together.
highlight.zh: Cinapse 重新打造製作排程——每個影視專案的根基,協助電影工作者更好、更快且協同地規劃從構想到成像的路徑。

summary.en: Open-source platform for API and UI test automation.
summary.zh: 開源的 API 與 UI 測試自動化平台。

highlight.en: Karate unifies API testing, performance testing, mocks, and UI testing with a low-code approach, reaching 1.5M monthly downloads and use by 76 of the Fortune 500.
highlight.zh: Karate 以低程式碼方式整合 API 測試、效能測試、模擬與 UI 測試,達到每月 150 萬次下載,並有 76 家財星 500 大企業採用。

summary.en: The first commodity marketplace for hydrogen.
summary.zh: 首個氫氣大宗商品交易市場。

highlight.en: Phoenix Hydrogen is building a hydrogen marketplace alongside a fulfillment platform: a 1,000-foot-tall underground warehouse for hydrogen, developed with major utilities.
highlight.zh: Phoenix Hydrogen 正打造氫氣交易市場,並與大型公用事業合作開發履約平台:一座 1000 英尺高的地下氫氣儲存倉庫。

summary.en: Modern tools to help you find and buy domain names.
summary.zh: 協助你尋找與購買網域名稱的現代化工具。

highlight.en: Founded in 2005, Instant Labs built the internet's fastest domain search engine, where people have run over 2.5M searches and purchased 250K domains with its free tool.
highlight.zh: Instant Labs 創立於 2005 年,打造了網路上最快的網域搜尋引擎,使用者已透過其免費工具進行超過 250 萬次搜尋並購買 25 萬個網域。

summary.en: AI agents for healthcare intake.
summary.zh: 用於醫療掛號與初診收案的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Sophys builds AI agents that handle healthcare intake for providers.
highlight.zh: Sophys 打造處理醫療掛號與初診收案流程的 AI 代理,服務醫療提供者。

summary.en: A freight marketplace for truck drivers.
summary.zh: 為卡車司機打造的貨運媒合市場。

highlight.en: Rome helps drivers find work, receive payments, and manage their business; today 80+ drivers earn up to 40% more by accessing 10x more loads scraped from brokers and shippers.
highlight.zh: Rome 協助司機找工作、收款並經營業務;目前 80 多名司機透過抓取貨運經紀與託運商的 10 倍貨源,收入提高最多 40%。

summary.en: A developer-friendly SMS/RCS API for startups.
summary.zh: 為新創打造、對開發者友善的 SMS/RCS API。

highlight.en: Sendo offers great docs, a fast dashboard, and easier 10DLC compliance, saving 40%+ versus Twilio and getting startups sending in 1-2 days instead of weeks.
highlight.zh: Sendo 提供完善文件、快速儀表板與更簡易的 10DLC 合規,費用較 Twilio 省下逾 40%,並讓新創在 1 至 2 天內即可發送訊息,而非等待數週。

summary.en: Build fully functional, full-stack web apps with AI, no coding required.
summary.zh: 用 AI 打造功能完整的全端網頁應用,無需寫程式。

highlight.en: Described as "Shopify for web apps," Blink turns a plain-language description into a deployable full-stack app, handling design, database, backend, hosting, and auth instantly.
highlight.zh: 被稱為「網頁應用版 Shopify」的 Blink 能將自然語言描述轉成可部署的全端應用,瞬間處理設計、資料庫、後端、託管與身分驗證。

summary.en: An AI-native crypto hedge fund.
summary.zh: 原生 AI 的加密貨幣對沖基金。

highlight.en: AYC Fund operates as an AI-native crypto hedge fund.
highlight.zh: AYC Fund 以原生 AI 的方式經營加密貨幣對沖基金。

summary.en: Direct access to proactive preventative health testing and treatments.
summary.zh: 直接取得主動式預防保健檢測與治療。

highlight.en: Instalab gives direct access to the preventative tests needed to stay on top of your health, used by tens of thousands of founders, executives, and professional athletes.
highlight.zh: Instalab 讓人直接取得維持健康所需的預防性檢測,已有數萬名創辦人、高階主管與職業運動員使用。

summary.en: An AI-powered analytics platform for the enterprise.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的 AI 驅動分析平台。

highlight.en: Redbird lets anyone in an organization automate and unify analytics without code, connecting to all data sources to accelerate prep, wrangling, analysis, reporting, and data science.
highlight.zh: Redbird 讓組織內任何人無需寫程式即可自動化並整合分析工作,連接所有資料來源以加速資料準備、整理、分析、報表與資料科學。

summary.en: An AI operations partner for mortgage lenders, servicers, and banks.
summary.zh: 為房貸放款商、服務商與銀行打造的 AI 營運夥伴。

highlight.en: Sei is an AI platform already live with banks and top independent mortgage banks (IMBs).
highlight.zh: Sei 是一個 AI 平台,已在多家銀行與頂尖獨立房貸銀行(IMB)上線運作。

summary.en: Storefronts on WhatsApp for small businesses in Southeast Asia.
summary.zh: 為東南亞小型企業在 WhatsApp 上打造的店面。

highlight.en: Yezza lets SE Asia businesses sell on WhatsApp, with $40K MRR, $3M monthly GMV, and 1,500 daily orders, while also supporting influencer deals and table reservations.
highlight.zh: Yezza 讓東南亞商家在 WhatsApp 上銷售,月經常性營收達 4 萬美元、月成交額 300 萬美元、每日 1500 筆訂單,並支援網紅合作與餐廳訂位等用途。

summary.en: An AI copilot for real-estate sales teams, powered by proprietary data.
summary.zh: 由專有資料驅動、為房地產銷售團隊打造的 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: Zorba is like Apollo or ZoomInfo but AI-first and real-estate-specific, using an LLM engine and a proprietary dataset of consolidated real estate entities to deliver real-time insights.
highlight.zh: Zorba 類似 Apollo 或 ZoomInfo,但以 AI 為先且專注房地產,運用 LLM 引擎與整合房地產實體的專有資料集提供即時洞察。

summary.en: Usage-based billing for API companies.
summary.zh: 為 API 公司提供按用量計費的服務。

highlight.en: Kable lets developers add usage-based billing, invoicing, analytics, and authentication to their API products with just three lines of code.
highlight.zh: Kable 讓開發者只需三行程式碼,即可為其 API 產品加入按用量計費、開立發票、分析與身分驗證。

summary.en: Find a home you can actually afford.
summary.zh: 找到你真正負擔得起的房子。

highlight.en: Stairs helps young Americans buy their first home by identifying properties based on their finances and connecting them to government grants, loans, and tax breaks.
highlight.zh: Stairs 協助美國年輕人購買首間房屋,依其財務狀況挑選房源,並媒合政府補助、貸款與稅務優惠。

summary.en: A multi-chain token data platform for developers.
summary.zh: 為開發者打造的多鏈代幣資料平台。

highlight.en: SimpleHash indexes multiple blockchains and handles edge cases so developers can query all token data from one platform in a few lines of code, serving Coinbase, Phantom, and Uniswap.
highlight.zh: SimpleHash 索引多條區塊鏈並處理邊界情況,讓開發者只需幾行程式碼即可從單一平台查詢所有代幣資料,客戶包括 Coinbase、Phantom 與 Uniswap。

summary.en: India's telemedicine platform and online pharmacy for dermatology care.
summary.zh: 印度的皮膚科遠距醫療平台與線上藥局。

highlight.en: Clinikally is a multi-condition health platform for dermatology, nutrition, and wellness, offering telehealth and AI-powered treatment plans personalized to each patient's history and lifestyle.
highlight.zh: Clinikally 是涵蓋皮膚科、營養與健康的多病種平台,提供遠距醫療與 AI 驅動的治療方案,依每位患者的病史與生活型態量身打造。

summary.en: Applied AI built for emerging economies.
summary.zh: 為新興經濟體打造的應用型 AI。

highlight.en: Latent Space's products include Halo AI (an AI concierge for SEA enterprises), GoVisa (AI visa and permit applications), and Supa (a hyperlocal knowledge AI for 280M+ Indonesians).
highlight.zh: Latent Space 的產品包括 Halo AI(東南亞企業的 AI 助理)、GoVisa(AI 簽證與許可申請),以及 Supa(服務逾 2.8 億印尼人的在地知識 AI)。

summary.en: Virtual restaurants and dark stores for Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲打造的虛擬餐廳與暗店。

highlight.en: FoodCourt has served over 350,000 meals in 12 months and takes a full-stack approach, controlling technology, production, and delivery to ensure a seamless on-demand experience.
highlight.zh: FoodCourt 在 12 個月內供應超過 35 萬份餐點,並採全棧式經營,掌控技術、生產與配送以確保順暢的隨需體驗。

summary.en: Minutes-fast online grocery delivery in Pakistan.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦的數分鐘快速線上生鮮配送。

highlight.en: Krave Mart is the Rappi for Pakistan, an online grocery store that delivers within minutes.
highlight.zh: Krave Mart 是巴基斯坦版的 Rappi,是一家能在數分鐘內配送的線上生鮮商店。

summary.en: The Costco for cloud, cutting AWS bills for startups.
summary.zh: 雲端版的 Costco,為新創降低 AWS 帳單。

highlight.en: Pump uses group buying and AI to save early-stage startups up to 60% on AWS for free, automating cost savings that require no engineering effort.
highlight.zh: Pump 運用團購與 AI,免費為早期新創節省最多 60% 的 AWS 費用,自動化省錢且無需任何工程投入。

summary.en: Inventory management SaaS for retail and consumer brands.
summary.zh: 為零售與消費品牌打造的庫存管理 SaaS。

highlight.en: Autone ingests a retailer's data and generates recommendations across pricing, replenishment, and re-ordering, letting users approve actions instead of relying on Excel or legacy systems.
highlight.zh: Autone 匯入零售商的資料,在定價、補貨與再訂購等面向產生建議,讓使用者只需核准行動,不必再依賴 Excel 或老舊系統。

summary.en: AI-powered talent sourcing for recruiters.
summary.zh: 為招募人員打造的 AI 人才搜尋工具。

highlight.en: Used by teams at Ramp, Perplexity, and 3,000+ customers, Juicebox has crossed $10M ARR with 20%+ monthly growth and raised $36M including a Sequoia-led Series A.
highlight.zh: Juicebox 獲 Ramp、Perplexity 等逾 3000 家客戶採用,年經常性營收突破 1000 萬美元、月成長逾 20%,並募得 3600 萬美元,包含由紅杉領投的 A 輪。

summary.en: YC's most popular security compliance platform (SOC 2, ISO 27001).
summary.zh: YC 社群最受歡迎的資安合規平台(SOC 2、ISO 27001)。

highlight.en: Oneleet combines automated tools with human expertise, going beyond compliance with a built-in code security scanner, attack-surface management, access reviews, and a trust portal.
highlight.zh: Oneleet 結合自動化工具與人工專業,超越單純合規,內建程式碼資安掃描器、攻擊面管理、存取審查與信任入口網站。

summary.en: AI-native commercial real estate operations, built by investors.
summary.zh: 由投資人打造、原生 AI 的商業地產營運平台。

highlight.en: Cambio uses LLMs and agentic AI to reason across thousands of pages of building data, letting investors evaluate retrofit opportunities across thousands of buildings and compress months of work into minutes.
highlight.zh: Cambio 運用 LLM 與代理式 AI 解讀數千頁建築資料,讓投資人能跨數千棟建物評估改造機會,將數月工作壓縮成數分鐘。

summary.en: Datadog for space: software to operate satellite constellations.
summary.zh: 太空版的 Datadog:用於操作衛星星座的軟體。

highlight.en: Built by six former OneWeb engineers, Quindar's SaaS automates mission management so a single engineer can operate hundreds of satellites instead of many engineers per satellite.
highlight.zh: 由六名前 OneWeb 工程師打造,Quindar 的 SaaS 自動化任務管理,讓單一工程師能操作數百顆衛星,顛覆傳統多名工程師操作一顆衛星的模式。

summary.en: A commission-free sports prediction market and trading app.
summary.zh: 免手續費的運動預測市場與交易應用。

highlight.en: Novig is the only platform offering commission-free sports trading, eliminating the traditional sportsbook model; it has raised over $100M from investors including Pantera, Lux, and Joe Montana.
highlight.zh: Novig 是唯一提供免手續費運動交易的平台,擺脫傳統博彩商模式,已募得逾 1 億美元,投資者包括 Pantera、Lux 與 Joe Montana。

summary.en: Agentic AI for power projects and AI infrastructure.
summary.zh: 用於電力專案與 AI 基礎設施的代理式 AI。

highlight.en: Paces automates early-stage due diligence for renewable energy and data center developers, streamlining siting, interconnection, and permitting to fast-track projects to construction-ready.
highlight.zh: Paces 為再生能源與資料中心開發商自動化早期盡職調查,簡化選址、併網與許可流程,加速專案進入可動工階段。

summary.en: An AI-driven group mobility platform using high-capacity vehicles.
summary.zh: 運用大容量車輛的 AI 驅動團體交通平台。

highlight.en: Fetii moves groups with the click of a button using high-capacity vehicles, transporting millions of riders each year and operating nationwide.
highlight.zh: Fetii 運用大容量車輛,讓使用者一鍵即可移動整個團體,每年載運數百萬名乘客並於全國營運。

summary.en: A premier growth platform for restaurants.
summary.zh: 為餐廳打造的頂級成長平台。

highlight.en: Boostly combines AI-powered SEO, paid ads, gamified text marketing, and reputation management, with patented processes that build opted-in subscriber lists faster than rivals.
highlight.zh: Boostly 結合 AI 驅動的 SEO、付費廣告、遊戲化簡訊行銷與聲譽管理,並以專利流程比同業更快建立已同意的訂閱名單。

summary.en: AI that automates non-emergency calls for 911 centers.
summary.zh: 為 911 中心自動處理非緊急電話的 AI。

highlight.en: Aurelian's AVA agent answers, triages, and resolves non-emergency calls like noise complaints, while CORA gives call-takers real-time SOP checklists and guidance during emergencies.
highlight.zh: Aurelian 的 AVA 代理可接聽、分流並處理噪音投訴等非緊急電話,而 CORA 則在緊急通話中為接線員提供即時 SOP 檢查表與指引。

summary.en: Credit for the emerging economy in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲新興經濟體提供信貸。

highlight.en: Kashin has 10K users and nearly $2M annualized revenue from small loans to micro-merchants, underwriting with a proprietary AI risk model processing 250+ variables from smartphones and credit bureaus.
highlight.zh: Kashin 擁有 1 萬名使用者,透過向微型商家提供小額貸款達到近 200 萬美元年化營收,並以專有 AI 風險模型處理來自智慧型手機與徵信機構的 250 多項變數進行核貸。

summary.en: An AI-powered global compliance and identity verification platform.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的全球合規與身分驗證平台。

highlight.en: AiPrise lets companies verify customers worldwide from a single platform, pulling 800+ data points on each business and 100+ on each individual.
highlight.zh: AiPrise 讓企業透過單一平台在全球驗證客戶,每家企業可取得 800 多項資料點、每位個人可取得 100 多項資料點。

summary.en: A headless, API-first ERP for retail operations.
summary.zh: 為零售營運打造的無頭、API 優先 ERP。

highlight.en: Unlike rigid systems like NetSuite and SAP, Tailor is modular and composable, replacing spreadsheets and point solutions while supporting multi-location inventory, DTC + B2B orders, and light manufacturing.
highlight.zh: 與 NetSuite、SAP 等僵化系統不同,Tailor 採模組化與可組合設計,取代試算表與單點工具,並支援多據點庫存、DTC 加 B2B 訂單及輕度製造。

summary.en: An ecosystem for options trading in India.
summary.zh: 印度的選擇權交易生態系。

highlight.en: AlgoTest lets Indian retail day traders use the same technology as top hedge funds and HFT firms; it was founded by a former US options market-maker and HFT technologist.
highlight.zh: AlgoTest 讓印度散戶當沖交易者能使用與頂尖對沖基金及高頻交易公司相同的技術,創辦人為前美國選擇權造市商與高頻交易技術專家。

summary.en: An AI talent platform to hire, manage, and grow your people.
summary.zh: 用於招募、管理與培育人才的 AI 人才平台。

highlight.en: Used by 500+ companies, Peoplebox centers on Nova, an AI teammate that runs voice/video pre-screens and first-round interviews, alongside a unified system for OKRs, reviews, and compensation.
highlight.zh: Peoplebox 獲 500 多家公司採用,核心是 AI 同事 Nova,可進行語音/視訊初篩與第一輪面試,並整合 OKR、績效考核與薪酬於單一系統。

summary.en: A compensation graph that helps companies optimize people spend.
summary.zh: 協助企業優化人事支出的薪酬圖譜。

highlight.en: CompUp is an API-driven benchmarking tool that integrates with HR/payroll systems to deliver real-time compensation data, replacing surveys updated only once a year when expectations shift ~7% quarterly.
highlight.zh: CompUp 是 API 驅動的薪酬基準工具,整合 HR/薪資系統以提供即時薪酬資料,取代每年僅更新一次的調查,而候選人期望每季變動約 7%。

summary.en: A frictionless eCommerce returns experience with 24-hour refunds.
summary.zh: 提供 24 小時退款的無摩擦電商退貨體驗。

highlight.en: REVER makes eCommerce returns possible in two clicks with refunds in 24 hours, currently handling over 100M euros in yearly returns with more than 50M euros in revenue.
highlight.zh: REVER 讓電商退貨只需兩次點擊、退款在 24 小時內完成,目前每年處理逾 1 億歐元退貨,營收超過 5000 萬歐元。

summary.en: Uber for trucks in Turkey.
summary.zh: 土耳其版的卡車 Uber。

highlight.en: In a fragmented market of ~850,000 independent truckers, Kamion connects businesses needing trucks with trucks needing loads, replacing the phone calls and emails that dominate freight forwarding.
highlight.zh: 在約 85 萬名獨立卡車司機構成的零散市場中,Kamion 媒合需要卡車的企業與尋找貨源的卡車,取代貨運仲介中盛行的電話與電子郵件。

summary.en: India's AI-native digital infrastructure for property intelligence.
summary.zh: 印度原生 AI 的房地產情報數位基礎設施。

highlight.en: Powered by its Terra engine, Landeed converts messy multi-source property records into structured, queryable knowledge for due diligence and title search, with coverage across 24 states.
highlight.zh: Landeed 由其 Terra 引擎驅動,將雜亂的多來源房產記錄轉為結構化、可查詢的知識,用於盡職調查與產權查核,涵蓋 24 個邦。

summary.en: AI for construction professionals.
summary.zh: 為營建專業人員打造的 AI。

highlight.en: TigerEye aims to eliminate busywork so construction professionals can focus on building the infrastructure that makes the world work.
highlight.zh: TigerEye 旨在消除繁瑣雜務,讓營建專業人員能專注於興建使世界運轉的基礎設施。

summary.en: Protecting people from scams by detecting fraud before it happens.
summary.zh: 在詐騙發生前偵測,保護人們免於受騙。

highlight.en: Alterya helps banks, fintechs, and crypto providers prevent authorized push payment (APP) fraud by detecting scams that target their users and exploit their platforms.
highlight.zh: Alterya 協助銀行、金融科技與加密貨幣服務商防範授權推送支付(APP)詐騙,偵測鎖定其使用者並利用其平台的騙局。

summary.en: Satellite swarms building a real-time 3D map of the world.
summary.zh: 以衛星群打造世界即時 3D 地圖。

highlight.en: Array Labs uses clusters of tiny satellites imaging the same place at the exact same time to improve image quality 60x, enabling new applications across AR/XR, defense, climate, and insurance.
highlight.zh: Array Labs 運用一群微型衛星在同一時刻拍攝同一地點,將影像品質提升 60 倍,為 AR/XR、國防、氣候與保險等領域開啟新應用。

summary.en: Engineering new chemistry for natural resource extraction.
summary.zh: 為天然資源開採設計新型化學技術。

highlight.en: Founded by a former DoD scientist, MaverickX offers PetroX and LithX to enhance recovery of oil from shale reservoirs and metals from low-grade ores as resources grow harder to extract.
highlight.zh: 由前國防部科學家創立,MaverickX 推出 PetroX 與 LithX,在資源日益難以開採之際,提升從頁岩儲層採油與從低品位礦石採金屬的回收率。

summary.en: Shopify for vehicles: an end-to-end vehicle commerce platform.
summary.zh: 車輛版的 Shopify:端到端車輛交易平台。

highlight.en: Ekho handles checkout, financing, titling, registration, and taxes so dealers and OEMs can sell titled vehicles nationwide with a Tesla-like experience and no large back-office teams.
highlight.zh: Ekho 處理結帳、融資、過戶、登記與稅務,讓經銷商與原廠能在全國銷售有產權登記的車輛,提供如 Tesla 般的體驗,且無需龐大的後勤團隊。

summary.en: Shopify for real estate agents in Latin America.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲房仲版的 Shopify。

highlight.en: Pulppo gives LatAm brokerages performance analytics, automatic listings, valuation tools, and a CRM, aiming to capture 20% of the $166B in annual commissions they generate.
highlight.zh: Pulppo 為拉美房仲提供績效分析、自動上架、估價工具與 CRM,目標是從其每年產生的 1660 億美元佣金中抽取 20%。

summary.en: An AI fraud prevention and consumer underwriting agent.
summary.zh: AI 防詐與消費者核保代理。

highlight.en: Two Dots is building an AI consumer underwriting automation agent.
highlight.zh: Two Dots 正打造一個 AI 消費者核保自動化代理。

summary.en: An open-source platform for healthcare data intelligence.
summary.zh: 用於醫療資料情報的開源平台。

highlight.en: Metriport provides real-time access to medical data for 300M+ US individuals, integrating with major healthcare IT systems to replace the fax-based record exchange that can take weeks.
highlight.zh: Metriport 為超過 3 億美國人提供即時醫療資料存取,並整合主要醫療 IT 系統,取代可能耗時數週的傳真式病歷交換。

summary.en: An API to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale.
summary.zh: 可大規模搜尋、抓取並與網頁互動的 API。

highlight.en: Firecrawl turns any web source into clean Markdown or structured data for AI agents; it is open source, ZDR-ready, and trusted by 80,000+ teams including Apple, Shopify, Canva, and Zapier.
highlight.zh: Firecrawl 將任何網頁來源轉為乾淨的 Markdown 或結構化資料供 AI 代理使用;它是開源、支援零資料保留(ZDR),並獲 Apple、Shopify、Canva 與 Zapier 等逾 8 萬個團隊信賴。

summary.en: A payment network connecting nonprofits to the $326B in donor-advised funds.
summary.zh: 連接非營利組織與 3260 億美元捐贈者建議基金的支付網路。

highlight.en: Chariot powers DAFpay, a TIME Best Invention of 2025 embedded on 100,000+ nonprofit donation forms including American Cancer Society, and a payment option on GoFundMe and GiveButter.
highlight.zh: Chariot 驅動的 DAFpay 獲選《時代》2025 年最佳發明,已嵌入逾 10 萬個非營利捐款表單(包括美國癌症協會),並成為 GoFundMe 與 GiveButter 上的支付選項。

summary.en: AI agents that automate sales busywork.
summary.zh: 自動化銷售雜務的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Truva's AI agents automate tedious tasks like email follow-ups and CRM data entry; many teams have seen up to a 25% increase in sales.
highlight.zh: Truva 的 AI 代理自動化郵件追蹤與 CRM 資料輸入等繁瑣工作,許多團隊的銷售額提升最多 25%。

summary.en: Turning the web into a structured database of real-world events.
summary.zh: 把網路變成真實世界事件的結構化資料庫。

highlight.en: NewsCatcher's CatchAll is a recall-first search API that retrieves large candidate sets from the web and extracts deduplicated records for long-list questions like funding rounds or regulatory actions.
highlight.zh: NewsCatcher 的 CatchAll 是召回優先的搜尋 API,能從網路擷取大量候選結果並萃取去重記錄,用於回答融資輪次或監管行動等「長名單」問題。

summary.en: A project management platform for field infrastructure.
summary.zh: 為現場基礎設施打造的專案管理平台。

highlight.en: Starting with telecom, Sytex helps companies like Telefonica and Claro build and maintain their networks.
highlight.zh: Sytex 從電信業切入,協助 Telefonica 與 Claro 等公司建設並維護其網路。

summary.en: One Medical for pets: tech-enabled modern veterinary care.
summary.zh: 寵物版的 One Medical:科技驅動的現代化獸醫照護。

highlight.en: Dr. Treat offers virtual and in-clinic veterinary services, using technology and data to deliver highly personalized, preventative care for every pet.
highlight.zh: Dr. Treat 提供線上與到院獸醫服務,運用技術與資料為每隻寵物提供高度個人化的預防性照護。

summary.en: The global mobile network for business.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的全球行動網路。

highlight.en: Devyce gives employees a business phone number in an app on their personal phone, with an analytics and management portal; its operator relationship lets it become a network itself, unlike SaaS VoIP rivals.
highlight.zh: Devyce 透過 App 在員工的個人手機上提供商務門號,並附帶分析與管理入口;憑藉與電信商的合作關係,它能真正成為行動網路,不同於 SaaS VoIP 同業。

summary.en: AI agents for insurance and benefits.
summary.zh: 用於保險與員工福利的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Pasito's Core AI ingests plan documents and census data into structured benefit intelligence, while its agents orchestrate decision support, plan comparisons, communications, and RFP management.
highlight.zh: Pasito 的核心 AI 將計畫文件與人口普查資料轉為結構化福利情報,其代理則協調決策支援、計畫比較、溝通與 RFP 管理等流程。

summary.en: A supply-chain risk and compliance platform for Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲打造的供應鏈風險與合規平台。

highlight.en: Plutto automates due diligence, compliance checks, and conflict-of-interest reviews so LatAm corporates can work with vendors and contractors safely.
highlight.zh: Plutto 自動化盡職調查、合規檢查與利益衝突審查,讓拉美企業能安全地與供應商及承包商合作。

summary.en: A unified API for HR, payroll, and recruiting software.
summary.zh: 整合人資、薪資與招募軟體的統一 API。

highlight.en: Kombo lets software companies integrate with dozens of HR, payroll, and recruiting systems through one unified API instead of building a separate integration for each.
highlight.zh: Kombo 讓軟體公司透過單一統一 API 整合數十種人資、薪資與招募系統,無需為每一個系統各別建置整合。

summary.en: Trusted dollar, euro, and pound accounts abroad for people from unstable economies.
summary.zh: 為來自不穩定經濟體的人提供海外可信的美元、歐元與英鎊帳戶。

highlight.en: nsave provides trusted $€£ accounts abroad for people from countries where inflation is high and banking is broken.
highlight.zh: nsave 為來自高通膨、銀行體系失能國家的人,提供可信賴的海外美元、歐元與英鎊帳戶。

summary.en: Sell your home without brokers.
summary.zh: 不透過仲介就能賣房。

highlight.en: HOMLI is building the first fully autonomous real estate broker, enabling homeowners to sell without agents.
highlight.zh: HOMLI 正打造首個全自動化的房地產仲介,讓屋主無需經紀人即可賣房。

summary.en: A global neo-bank for contractors and freelancers.
summary.zh: 為承包商與自由工作者打造的全球新型銀行。

highlight.en: Ping gives international contractors a US dollar account, a crypto account, and invoicing; workers make on average 4% more money and get paid the same day.
highlight.zh: Ping 為國際承包商提供美元帳戶、加密貨幣帳戶與開立發票功能;工作者平均多賺 4% 收入,且當日即可收款。

summary.en: An e-commerce platform for construction materials in Indonesia.
summary.zh: 印尼的建材電商平台。

highlight.en: Materee simplifies construction material procurement in Indonesia, replacing the many phone calls and back-and-forth messages so contractors can focus on completing their projects.
highlight.zh: Materee 簡化印尼的建材採購,取代繁多的電話與來回訊息,讓承包商能專注完成自己的工程。

summary.en: Building robotic mushroom farms.
summary.zh: 打造機器人菇類農場。

highlight.en: Hedgehog's robots eliminate labor and its AI optimizes grow conditions, aiming to grow mushrooms for under a third of leading growers' cost while turning agricultural waste into protein-rich food.
highlight.zh: Hedgehog 的機器人省去人力、AI 優化生長條件,目標以領先業者三分之一以下的成本種菇,同時將農業廢棄物轉化為高蛋白食物。

summary.en: Video AI to automatically detect and respond to production line problems.
summary.zh: 自動偵測並回應生產線問題的影像 AI。

highlight.en: Cerrion uses standard CCTV cameras and computer vision to detect production issues in real time; one Pepsi supplier producing 500 bottles a minute now catches a fallen bottle before it blocks the line.
highlight.zh: Cerrion 運用標準 CCTV 攝影機與電腦視覺即時偵測生產問題;一家每分鐘生產 500 瓶的 Pepsi 供應商,如今能在倒瓶阻塞產線前即時發現。

summary.en: An agentic intelligence layer for merchant risk decisions.
summary.zh: 用於商戶風險決策的代理式智慧層。

highlight.en: Ballerine unifies business registries, transaction patterns, sanctions lists, and web intelligence into one platform whose AI agents learn from live data to flag fraud, laundering, or non-compliance.
highlight.zh: Ballerine 將企業登記、交易模式、制裁名單與網路情報整合至單一平台,其 AI 代理從即時資料中學習,以標記詐欺、洗錢或違規行為。

summary.en: A Bitcoin-native neobank for managing all things money.
summary.zh: 原生比特幣、管理所有金錢事務的新型銀行。

highlight.en: Bitstack grew from a product turning spare change into bitcoin into a bitcoin-native neobank, aiming to make getting started with Bitcoin simple, fun, and accessible to everyone.
highlight.zh: Bitstack 從將零錢轉成比特幣的產品,成長為原生比特幣的新型銀行,致力讓人人都能簡單、有趣且輕鬆地開始使用比特幣。

summary.en: LatAm Web3 wealthtech for auto-investing in securities and crypto.
summary.zh: 拉美 Web3 財富科技,用於自動投資證券與加密貨幣。

highlight.en: Weltio gives users a full USD brokerage account with local instant cash rails, a robo-advisor, and tailored portfolios, starting in Mexico, a market with $60B+ AUM potential.
highlight.zh: Weltio 為使用者提供完整的美元券商帳戶,搭配在地即時現金通道、機器人理財顧問與量身打造的投資組合,從墨西哥起步——一個潛在管理資產逾 600 億美元的市場。

summary.en: An AI claims workbench automating insurance claims.
summary.zh: 自動化保險理賠的 AI 理賠工作台。

highlight.en: Stream's AI agents turn a constant stream of claims PDFs into automated workflows and high-value signals, freeing claims teams to focus on getting people treatment and benefits.
highlight.zh: Stream 的 AI 代理將源源不斷的理賠 PDF 轉為自動化流程與高價值訊號,讓理賠團隊能專注於協助民眾取得治療與應得的給付。

summary.en: A neobank for African migrants in Europe.
summary.zh: 為歐洲非洲移民打造的新型銀行。

highlight.en: Moneco serves the African diaspora in Europe with a current account, payment card, and free remittances, aiming to become a one-stop shop for all their financial needs.
highlight.zh: Moneco 為歐洲的非洲移民社群提供活期帳戶、支付卡與免費匯款,目標成為滿足其所有金融需求的一站式服務。

summary.en: Smart, fast, and collaborative compliance reviews.
summary.zh: 智慧、快速且協作的合規審查。

highlight.en: Blee integrates across the content creation workflow, combining instant feedback and faster approvals with scalable review and recordkeeping so companies move to market faster with less risk.
highlight.zh: Blee 整合於內容創作流程中,結合即時回饋、更快核准與可擴展的審查及記錄保存,讓企業以更低風險更快推向市場。

summary.en: A mobile app that automates savings and invests them in gold.
summary.zh: 自動化儲蓄並投入黃金的行動應用。

highlight.en: Gullak targets the 200M Indians who save manually in low-return bank deposits, channeling automated savings into gold; it grew from 0 to 40K transacting users and $280K monthly GTV in 60 days.
highlight.zh: Gullak 鎖定 2 億名以低報酬銀行存款手動儲蓄的印度人,將自動化儲蓄導入黃金;上線 60 天即從零成長至 4 萬名交易使用者、月成交額 28 萬美元。
